signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 25 Candidates for Kerala Assembly 2026, Confirms 27 Total Seats in UDF Alliance | YES | MED
signals.raw:

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts; no breaking announcements today on new data, resolutions, or policy shifts to move prediction markets.[1]**  
Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% last week (6th meeting), raising 2026 inflation outlook to 2.2% from 2.1% amid Middle East oil shocks.[1][3]

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market is "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?", with crowd odds at 97% for resolution by December 31, 2026, amid $121M+ total X market volume; traders on X are buzzing about this as a key sentiment gauge for escalating tensions.[1]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits $13M Volume | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits $13M Volume | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" market leads Tweet Markets with 88% odds on 300-319 tweets, drawing heavy X discussion on Musk's posting frenzy and X product shifts like Nikita Bier's potential exit by June 30.[1][4]

signals.headline: Top Leaderboard Whales Signal Smart Money in Geopolitics/Tech | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Top Leaderboard Whales Signal Smart Money in Geopolitics/Tech | YES | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's monthly profit leaderboard highlights whales like 0x492442... (+$7.1M) and HorizonSplendidView (+$4M) as potential smart money; X posts speculate their bets cluster in high-volume markets like Iran-Israel and Musk tweets, though specific positions aren't public.[3]

signals.headline: X Traders Flag Potential Mispricing in Conflict End Date | YES | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
X Traders Flag Potential Mispricing in Conflict End Date | YES | LOW confidence**  
Some X sentiment questions the 97% December 31 odds on Iran x Israel/US conflict as overpriced given ongoing escalations, with tips to bet NO on early resolutions; multi-outcome structure amplifies trader debates on mispriced tails.[1]
